summary: Both issues implemented correctly with good test coverage. Minor concerns about estimated PixelLab cost and missing Playwright E2E test.

findings.description: COST_PER_GENERATION is a hardcoded estimate ($0.01). PixelLab is subscription-based so per-call cost is inherently amortized, but this should be refined with real usage data. Added TODO comment.

PixelLab API URL (https://api.pixellab.ai/v1/generate) may not match the actual API. MCP tools suggest separate endpoints per asset type (create_character, create_tileset, etc.). Will need adjustment when integrating with real API.
Missing E2E Playwright test for game canvas resolution (1280x720) as specified in issue acceptance criteria. Unit tests for WebSocket and events are thorough.
Phaser.js bundle is 1.4MB (expected for the library). Code splitting can be addressed when more scenes are added.
